stemHtml: VFR in VMC in controlled airspace, radio fails. You should (1) _____ and land (2) _____.

options.a: (1) Stay in the CTR, (2) as soon as possible.
options.b: (1) Descend below the CTR, (2) at destination.
options.c: (1) Fly at MSA, (2) at the first aerodrome in sight.
options.d: (1) Continue VMC, (2) at the nearest suitable airport.
